content: Contact link copied successfully. The link is valid for 7 days.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a success message when a contact link is successfully copied. It will appear in a notification area, likely after a button click or confirmation action. The message should indicate that the link is valid for 7 days, providing context for users who may need to share it again soon.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Bulgarian translation is grammatically incomplete and lacks the necessary preposition to convey the meaning 'valid for 7 days'. It currently reads 'valid 7 days'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Линкът за контакт е копиран успешно. Линкът е валиден за 7 дни.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation incorrectly translates 'Contact link' as 'Project committee' (ຄະນະໂຄງການຕິດຕໍ່), which changes the meaning entirely. It should refer to a link for contact.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ຄັດລອກລິ້ງຕິດຕໍ່ສຳເລັດແລ້ວ. ລິ້ງນີ້ແມ່ນ ໃຊ້ໄດ້ເປັນເວລາ 7 ມື້.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation adds the word 'tylko' (only), which changes the meaning from 'valid for 7 days' to 'valid ONLY for 7 days'. While subtle, it adds a restrictive nuance not present in the source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Link kontaktowy został skopiowany pomyślnie. Link jest ważny przez 7 dni.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Romanian translation adds the word 'numai' (only), which changes the meaning from 'valid for 7 days' to 'valid ONLY for 7 days'. While subtle, it adds a restrictive nuance not present in the source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Link-ul de contact a fost copiat cu succes. Linkul este valabil 7 zile.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Serbian translation is grammatically incomplete and fails to convey the full meaning. 'Линк је важећи 7 дана.' translates to 'The link is valid 7 days.', missing the preposition 'for' or a verb structure that makes sense in Serbian (e.g., 'will be valid' or 'is valid for').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Линк за контакт је успешно копиран. Линк важи 7 дана.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Serbian translation is grammatically incomplete and changes the meaning. 'Link je važeći 7 dana' translates to 'Link is valid 7 days', which is an incorrect construction in Serbian. It should state that the link 'is valid for 7 days'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Link za kontakt je uspešno kopiran. Link važi 7 dana.
